scroll_found.title: Research the Fallen scroll at a Research Pedestal

ruin_visit.title: Find and enter 3 different types of ruins or abandoned structures — read what they left behind

subtitle.text: Nine civilizations built this world. None of them survived to see you walk through it.

description: CH.05 · THE FALLEN
▸ The world was not empty when you arrived.
It was emptied.
Nine civilizations. Each one shaped the land.
Each one left something.
Each one is gone.
◈ THE NINE CIVILIZATIONS (LORE)
└ ◇ The Architects: built the great structures
their roads still run (Via Romana)
└ ◇ The Tenders: kept the wild garden
their meadows still bloom
└ ◇ The Fermenters: built the first cellars
their barrels still age wine underground
└ ◇ The Scholars: wrote the scrolls you're reading
their libraries are the ruins you explore
└ ◇ The Hunters: left trophy rooms in every cave
└ ◇ The Craftsmen: the forge-builders, still warm
└ ◇ The Void-Seekers: entered the End early
did not return in the way they left
└ ◇ The Infernal: went into the Nether willingly
└ ◇ The Eye-Holders: gathered the Nine Eyes
their fate is the reason you are here
◈ SCROLL: The Fallen
└ Found in: ancient ruins, abandoned libraries,
memorial site chests, deep dungeon archives
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: world narrative context,
ruin significance awareness
▸ The Eye-Holders believed the Eyes
would keep the world from collapsing.
They were right about what the Eyes could do.
They were wrong about what would happen after.
▶ Find The Fallen scroll [check]
▶ Enter 3 different types of ruins [check]
◇ The Scarlet King (lore scroll, this chapter)
is what ended the Eye-Holders.
Ch12 is where you face it.
Read the lore before then.
